Trồng</Caption><DataMember>VuTrongName</DataMember><DefaultGroupInterval>Text</DefaultGroupInterval><DefaultGroupPrefix>Vụ ##0.###</FormatString><Key>NoGoc</Key><Position>4</Position><TextAlignment>Far</TextAlignment><Width>87</Width><DefaultValue>0</DefaultValue><DefaultValueType>System.Int32</DefaultValueType></Column4><Column5 ID="NoLai"><Caption>Nợ Lãi</Caption><DataMember>NoLai</DataMember><EditType>NoEdit</EditType><FormatString>### ###
